MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SCHNADER HARRISON SEGAL & LEWIS LLP's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Appearances via Zoom: Stacy Villagomez of Allen Matkins (213.622.5555) for plaintiff and responding party; Stephen Dye of Schnader Harrison (415.364.6700) for defendant and moving party.

The Court conducts and evidentiary hearing regarding service of the summons and complaint. The following witness, appearing in the courtroom, is sworn and examined: Process Server Andres Esquer. The examination concludes and the witness is excused. Although John Soliman is available via Zoom as required by the Court's tentative ruling, counsel present no further witnesses. The motion to quash is argued.

Arguments having concluded, the Court grants the motion. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kenneth Brill, CSR 12797 (T: 866.299.5127, E: calendar-ca@veritext.com) (501/CFH)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SCHNADER HARRISON SEGAL & LEWIS LLP'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

No appearances. This matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on June 13, 2023. That department handles all landlord-tenant/real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. All parties shall provide courtesy copies of their filings with department 501 as soon as possible with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/CEK)
